title: The Succession of Muhammad al-Amin as Caliph
description: In this year, allegiance was sworn to Muhammad al-Amin b. Hirun as caliph at the camp of al-Rashid. t 'Abdallih b. Hirun (al-Ma' mun) was in Marw at the time? According to what has been mentioned, Hammawayh3 the mawla4 of al-Mahdi, the r. At the time of his death, the caliph Hirun al-Rashid was leading an army raised in Iraq to fight the rebel Raft' b. Layth in Khurasin province. He had left Baghdad on 5 Sha'bin t9 2. (June 4, 8o8) and died at Tus (see note 6) on 3 jumidi II 193 (March 14, 8o9).

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
